tasks.title: Audit existing AI Tutor, local storage, website and extension actions, and settings
tasks.description: Perform a comprehensive audit of the current AI Tutor implementation, local storage abstractions, website user actions, extension actions, and settings UI and data models. Document existing event emission points, storage usage, and settings management to identify reuse opportunities and integration points for the proactive AI Tutor system.
acceptanceCriteria: Documented list of existing AI Tutor features and storage usage
List of website and extension user actions with current event emissions
Summary of current settings UI and data models relevant to AI Tutor
tasks.expectedResult: A detailed audit report outlining existing AI Tutor, storage, event emission, and settings infrastructure to guide integration

outputPlan.description: Audit report of existing AI Tutor, storage, events, and settings

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundational knowledge for integrating proactive AI Tutor system

tasks.title: Define typed frontend learning event model with discriminated unions
tasks.description: Create a comprehensive TypeScript event model for all learning events listed in the specification. Use discriminated union types for event payloads to ensure type safety and clarity. Include all required fields such as eventId, eventType, source, timestamp, page, entityType, entityId, payload, metadata, sessionId, correlationId, createdAt, and syncStatus with default 'local_only'. Place the model in a dedicated file `src/features/learningEvents/types.ts`.
acceptanceCriteria: All event types from the specification are represented with strong TypeScript types
Payloads use discriminated unions without any usage
Model includes all required fields with correct types
Model file compiles without errors
tasks.expectedResult: A fully typed learning event model file with discriminated union payloads and all required fields

outputPlan.description: TypeScript definitions for learning event model with discriminated unions

metadata.inputContext: Audit report on existing event usage and storage
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the foundational event data model for the proactive AI Tutor system

tasks.title: Implement local learning event repository using IndexedDB abstraction
tasks.description: Create a local repository module `src/features/learningEvents/learningEventRepository.ts` that provides CRUD operations for learning events using IndexedDB. Reuse existing IndexedDB abstractions if available. The repository must support saving events, querying by event type, date ranges, and session, and marking syncStatus as 'local_only'. Include error handling and fallback to in-memory storage if IndexedDB is unavailable.
acceptanceCriteria: Events can be saved and retrieved correctly from IndexedDB
Query functions support filtering by eventType and date
SyncStatus is set to 'local_only' on save
Repository handles errors gracefully without blocking main app flow
tasks.expectedResult: A robust local event repository module with IndexedDB persistence and query capabilities

outputPlan.description: Local IndexedDB-backed repository for learning events

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides persistent local storage for learning events enabling offline-first behavior

tasks.title: Create central LearningEventBus with event validation, timestamping, session management, and local saving
tasks.description: Implement a singleton LearningEventBus module `src/features/learningEvents/LearningEventBus.ts` that exposes an API `emitLearningEvent(event)` to emit learning events. The bus must validate event payloads against the typed model, add timestamps and sessionId, save events using the LearningEventRepository, notify the ProactiveTutorEngine asynchronously, and handle errors without blocking the main user action. Ensure the bus supports multiple subscribers and safe error handling.
acceptanceCriteria: Event payloads are validated before processing
Timestamps and sessionId are added automatically
Events are saved locally with syncStatus 'local_only'
ProactiveTutorEngine is notified asynchronously on event emission
Errors in event processing do not block or break user actions
tasks.expectedResult: A robust event bus module that centralizes learning event emission and local persistence

outputPlan.description: Central event bus for emitting and processing learning events

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a centralized, safe, and extensible event emission system for proactive AI Tutor

tasks.title: Implement ProactiveTutorSettingsRepository with LocalStorage persistence and default values
tasks.description: Create a settings repository module `src/features/proactiveTutor/ProactiveTutorSettingsRepository.ts` that manages proactive AI Tutor user preferences. Persist settings in LocalStorage with a clear schema matching the design document. Provide methods to get, set, and reset settings with defaults. Include all toggles and preferences such as enable/disable, reminder frequency, quiet hours, tutor tone, preferred language, and category toggles. Ensure settings are loaded on app start and changes are reactive.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings persist correctly in LocalStorage
Default values are applied when no user settings exist
All specified settings fields are supported
Settings changes are reactive and can be subscribed to
tasks.expectedResult: A fully functional proactive tutor settings repository with LocalStorage persistence

outputPlan.description: Settings repository for proactive AI Tutor preferences persisted in LocalStorage

metadata.inputContext: Audit report and design document for proactive tutor settings
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables user control over proactive AI Tutor behavior with persistent settings

tasks.title: Add enable/disable toggle and related controls to Proactive AI Tutor Settings UI
tasks.description: Modify the existing Settings UI at `src/features/settings/ProactiveTutorSettings.tsx` or create it if missing. Add a master toggle to enable or disable the proactive AI Tutor feature. Include controls for reminder frequency, maximum messages per day, quiet hours, category toggles, tutor tone, and preferred language as per design. Ensure the UI clearly explains the feature and persists changes via ProactiveTutorSettingsRepository. When disabled, ensure no proactive messages or badges appear.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings UI includes all required toggles and controls
Settings changes persist and reflect in the repository
UI clearly explains the proactive AI Tutor feature
Disabling proactive AI Tutor disables all proactive messages and badges
tasks.expectedResult: A user-friendly settings UI for controlling proactive AI Tutor with full persistence

outputPlan.description: Settings UI for proactive AI Tutor enable/disable and preferences

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Allows users to enable or disable proactive AI Tutor and configure preferences

tasks.title: Add event emission to key website user actions using LearningEventBus
tasks.description: Integrate event emission calls into key website user actions such as Dashboard opened, Today plan opened, Study task started/completed/skipped, Vocabulary saved/reviewed/forgotten/mastered, Article saved, Practice completed, Mistake saved, Progress viewed, AI progress review generated, Settings updated, and AI provider configured. Use the centralized LearningEventBus.emitLearningEvent API to emit typed events with correct payloads. Ensure no duplicate event calls and that event emission failures do not block user actions.
acceptanceCriteria: All specified user actions emit correct learning events
Events are emitted via LearningEventBus with validated payloads
No duplicate event emissions occur
Event emission failures do not block user actions
tasks.expectedResult: Key website user actions emit learning events through the centralized event bus

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables capturing user learning actions as events for proactive AI Tutor processing

tasks.title: Add event emission to key extension actions if extension exists
tasks.description: If the browser extension is present, integrate event emission into extension actions such as Popup opened, Selected text detected/explained/simplified, Vocabulary saved from webpage, Article saved from webpage, Video content saved, Saved word highlighted, Auto highlight enabled/disabled, Vocabulary review started from extension, and AI Tutor opened from extension. Use typed extension messages and send events safely without breaking content scripts or leaking CSS. Use the LearningEventBus or extension-specific event channel as appropriate.
acceptanceCriteria: Extension actions emit typed learning events correctly
No duplicate UI or CSS leaks occur
Extension content scripts remain stable
Events are sent safely without breaking extension functionality
tasks.expectedResult: Extension actions emit learning events integrated with the proactive AI Tutor system

outputPlan.description: Add event emission calls to extension actions

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables proactive AI Tutor event tracking from extension user actions

tasks.title: Implement ProactiveTutorRuleEngine to decide message display based on event and context
tasks.description: Create a ProactiveTutorRuleEngine module `src/features/proactiveTutor/ProactiveTutorRuleEngine.ts` that receives learning events and local learning context, user settings, cooldown state, and applies rules to decide whether to show a tutor message. Implement decision logic considering event type, frequency, user progress, exam date, today plan status, weak skills, cooldowns, quiet hours, user activity, and message usefulness. Return decision results with shouldShow, reason, priority, messageType, suggestedAction, cooldownKey, and delayUntil if needed. Support decision results: show_message, store_silent, delay_message, merge_with_existing, ignore_event.
acceptanceCriteria: Rule engine returns correct decision results for various event and context inputs
Cooldown and quiet hours are respected
User settings are respected including enable/disable and category toggles
Decision results include all required fields
Engine is extensible for future rule additions
tasks.expectedResult: A robust rule engine module that decides proactive tutor message display based on event and context

outputPlan.description: Rule engine for proactive tutor message decision logic

metadata.inputContext: Learning events, user settings, cooldown state
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Core decision logic for when and how proactive AI Tutor messages are shown

tasks.title: Implement cooldown and anti-spam logic for proactive tutor messages
tasks.description: Create a cooldown management module `src/features/proactiveTutor/CooldownManager.ts` that tracks message cooldowns, daily message caps, quiet hours, and prevents spamming. Integrate with ProactiveTutorRuleEngine to enforce limits such as max 1 message every 20 minutes, max 3 messages per day, same message type cooldowns, and quiet hours blocking. Provide APIs to check cooldown status, record message shown, and reset cooldowns. Persist cooldown state locally using IndexedDB or LocalStorage.
acceptanceCriteria: Cooldown limits are enforced correctly
Daily message caps are respected
Quiet hours prevent message display
Cooldown state persists locally and survives app restarts
APIs integrate cleanly with rule engine
tasks.expectedResult: A cooldown manager module that prevents user annoyance by limiting proactive messages

outputPlan.description: Cooldown and anti-spam logic for proactive tutor messages

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Prevents spamming and respects user preferences for proactive messages

tasks.title: Implement ProactiveTutorContextBuilder to aggregate learning context for decision making
tasks.description: Create a context builder module `src/features/proactiveTutor/ProactiveTutorContextBuilder.ts` that aggregates local learning events, user progress, exam date, today plan status, weak skills, mistake history, vocabulary review status, last tutor message time, and user activity state into a single EngineInput object. This context will be passed to the ProactiveTutorRuleEngine for message decision. Use local repositories and storage to gather data efficiently.
acceptanceCriteria: Context builder aggregates all required data accurately
Output EngineInput matches expected shape for rule engine
Context updates reactively on new events and data changes
tasks.expectedResult: A context builder module that provides comprehensive learning context for proactive tutor decisions

outputPlan.description: Aggregates learning context for proactive tutor rule engine

metadata.inputContext: Learning event repository, user settings, cooldown state
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the comprehensive learning context needed for intelligent message decisions

tasks.title: Create ProactiveTutorPromptBuilder for AI-generated message prompts with fallback
tasks.description: Implement a prompt builder module `src/features/proactiveTutor/ProactiveTutorPromptBuilder.ts` that constructs compact AI prompts using user profile, target band, exam date, today plan, recent events, mistakes, vocabulary due, progress summary, preferred language, and tutor tone. The prompt must instruct AI to generate short, friendly, specific IELTS tutor messages with one clear next action. Implement validation of AI responses and fallback to rule-based messages if AI is unavailable or response is invalid.
acceptanceCriteria: Prompt builder creates compact, context-rich AI prompts
AI responses are validated for required fields
Fallback messages are used when AI is unavailable or invalid
Prompt builder integrates with AI provider adapter
tasks.expectedResult: A prompt builder module that generates AI prompts and validates AI responses with fallback

outputPlan.description: Builds AI prompts for proactive tutor messages with validation and fallback

metadata.inputContext: ProactiveTutorContextBuilder output and AI provider adapter
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables AI-enhanced personalized proactive tutor messages with safe fallback

tasks.title: Create ProactiveTutorMessageRepository to store and manage proactive messages locally
tasks.description: Implement a message repository module `src/features/proactiveTutor/ProactiveTutorMessageRepository.ts` that stores proactive tutor messages locally using IndexedDB. Support message lifecycle states: pending, shown, dismissed, clicked, expired. Provide APIs to add, update, query, and expire messages. Ensure messages can be retrieved for display in UI surfaces and prevent repeated messages. Integrate with cooldown manager to update message status.
acceptanceCriteria: Messages are stored and retrieved correctly with lifecycle states
Message expiration and dismissal are supported
Repository integrates with cooldown and rule engine
Messages can be queried for UI display
tasks.expectedResult: A local message repository managing proactive tutor messages and their lifecycle

outputPlan.description: Local IndexedDB repository for proactive tutor messages

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Manages proactive tutor messages lifecycle and storage for UI consumption

tasks.title: Implement frontend-only time-based event scheduler and local checks
tasks.description: Create a frontend-only scheduler module `src/features/proactiveTutor/TutorLocalSchedulerService.ts` that runs periodic local checks for time-based events such as daily study reminders, vocabulary review due, weekly progress review, inactivity return, exam countdown warnings, and missed study days. On app open and focus, check last active time and generate missed events. Use safe intervals for periodic checks while app is open. If extension exists and supports Chrome alarms safely, integrate extension alarms for extension-side reminders only. Persist last check times locally.
acceptanceCriteria: Time-based events are generated correctly on app open and focus
Periodic checks run safely while app is open
Extension alarms are used only if safe and available
Scheduler persists last check times and recovers after app restart
tasks.expectedResult: A frontend-only scheduler service that triggers time-based learning events without backend

outputPlan.description: Frontend-only time-based event scheduler and local checks

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables time-based event generation and reminders without backend dependencies

tasks.title: Develop Proactive AI Tutor message UI components and integrate with message repository
tasks.description: Create UI components for proactive AI Tutor messages including Dashboard AI Tutor card, floating AI Tutor button with badge, AI Tutor chat page message thread, notification panel, and extension popup tutor card if extension exists. Components must be modern, clean, consistent with design system, easy to dismiss, actionable, and not annoying. Each message displays message text, optional reason, primary action button, dismiss button, and ask AI Tutor button. Integrate UI with ProactiveTutorMessageRepository to display pending messages and update message status on user interaction.

Messages can be dismissed and actions triggered
UI respects message priority and display rules
No intrusive popups for low priority messages
Extension UI integrates if extension exists

Floating AI Tutor button with badge for proactive messages
